about_intro_1: I was born and raised in Kazan, Russia. Since autumn 2026 I have been living in Spain.
about_intro_2: My profile goes beyond classic HR: I have led teams in maintenance projects, implemented automation systems for the banking sector, and taken part in large-scale HR transformations.
about_intro_3: I worked on the WebSoft HCM implementations for the Accounts Chamber of the Russian Federation and Rostics (ex KFC), served as team lead on the WebSoft rollout at Askona, and managed the WebSoft HCM implementation at GMCS VerEx.
about_intro_4: Today I focus on team building, SMB sales, and negotiations with potential clients. My style is hyper-responsibility, deep focus, and a results-first mindset for both company goals and personal performance.
about_edu_1_desc: Kazan (Volga Region) Federal University — management of innovation projects in high-tech industries.
about_edu_2_desc: Kazan (Volga Region) Federal University — digital transformation of enterprises.
about_edu_3_desc: Kazan (Volga Region) Federal University — physics of condensed matter and logistics of international ports.
about_add_2_desc: Human psychology, mediation, and physiognomy / negotiation.
about_add_5_desc: Current aspects of inclusive higher education (students with disabilities).

client_1_request: Reorganization of organizational structure and migration of processes to WebSoft HCM platform

case_cta_title: Want similar results for your company?
client_1_challenge: GMCS VerEx needed to reorganize their organizational structure and migrate HR processes to the WebSoft HCM platform while maintaining business continuity.
client_1_solution_1_desc: Conducted comprehensive audit of existing HR processes and organizational structure
client_1_solution_2_desc: Led migration from Axapta to WebSoft HCM with minimal downtime
client_1_solution_3_desc: Implemented change management program to ensure smooth adoption
client_1_testimonial: Danil led our complex HR platform migration with exceptional professionalism. The transition was smooth and our team adapted quickly to the new system.
client_2_challenge: Bank of Kazan needed to implement GreenData low-code platform to streamline their data management processes and reduce dependency on external developers.
client_2_solution_1_desc: Configured GreenData platform according to bank's security requirements
client_2_solution_2_desc: Trained internal team on low-code development best practices
client_2_solution_3_desc: Automated key data management workflows using GreenData
client_2_testimonial: Thanks to Danil, we now have a flexible data management system that our team can modify without external help. The ROI was evident within 3 months.
